top_issues.name: Federal Spending & Government Reform
top_issues.stance: Advocates reducing federal spending and structural government reforms. top_issues.stance: Sponsored legislation directed at the Chinese government, including the CCP Sanctions Shot Clock Act, the Chinese CBDC Prohibition Act, and the Blocking CCP Spy Tech Act. Also sponsored the DEMOCRACIA Act, which would impose sanctions on the Cuban government.
